src/flit/foundation/binding

      • addPostFrameCallback(b: Binding; cb: PostFrameCallback)

      • clearDirty(b: Binding)

        dispatchKey
      • dispatchKey(b: Binding; ev: KeyEvent)
        dispatchPointer
      • dispatchPointer(b: Binding; ev: PointerEvent)
        markRootDirty
      • markRootDirty(b: Binding; root: Element)

        scheduleFrame
      • scheduleFrame(b: Binding; cb: FrameCallback)

Binding: the runtime that owns the element tree, drives frames, and dispatches input. Mirrors Flutter's WidgetsBinding / SchedulerBinding singletons combined into one struct.

A Binding is created once per app (usually by runApp) and stored in the module-level globalBinding. Platform runners (platform/desktop/runner, etc.) drive frames by:

  1. Polling platform events and dispatching them via dispatchPointer / dispatchKey.
  2. Calling processPointerEvents (from runtime.nim) to deliver events to gesture detectors.
  3. Walking dirtyRoots and rebuilding any subtrees that need it.
  4. Running frameCallbacks for active tickers.
  5. Repainting and presenting the frame.

Imports

widget, render_object, geometry, diagnostics

Types

Binding = ref object
  rootElement*: Element
  rootRender*: RenderObject
  canvas*: Canvas
  dirtyRoots*: seq[Element]
  needsRepaint*: bool
  frameCallbacks*: seq[FrameCallback]
  postFrame*: seq[PostFrameCallback]
  pendingPointers*: Deque[PointerEvent]
  pendingKeys*: Deque[KeyEvent]
  surfaceSize*: Size
  devicePixelRatio*: float32
  startTime*: float
  frameCount*: int
  locale*: string
  debugInspector*: bool
App-wide runtime state. One per app, available as globalBinding. Fields:
  • rootElement: top of the element tree.
  • rootRender: top of the render tree (set by the runner after layout).
  • canvas: drawing surface.
  • dirtyRoots: elements that need rebuilding next frame.
  • needsRepaint: set by scroll and other layout-stable changes to request a paint-only frame.
  • frameCallbacks: callbacks to run on the next frame.
  • postFrame: callbacks to run after the next frame.
  • pendingPointers / pendingKeys: event queues.
  • surfaceSize: the window size in logical pixels.
  • devicePixelRatio: scale factor for HiDPI.
  • startTime: epoch time when the binding was created.
  • frameCount: total frames rendered.
  • locale: BCP-47 locale string ("en-US" by default).
  • debugInspector: when true, the runner shows debug overlays.
FrameCallback = proc (timestamp: float)
Called once per frame with the current binding-relative timestamp in seconds. Used by Ticker to drive animations. 
KeyEvent = object
  kind*: KeyEventKind
  keyCode*: int
  scancode*: int
  modifiers*: uint32
  text*: string
A single key event. keyCode is a logical key code, scancode is the physical key, modifiers is a bitmask of Shift/Ctrl/Alt/etc., text is the typed character (may be empty for non-printing keys). 
KeyEventKind = enum
  keDown, keUp, keRepeat
Key-event lifecycle: press, release, auto-repeat. 
PointerEvent = object
  kind*: PointerEventKind
  pointer*: int
  position*: Offset
  delta*: Offset
  scrollDelta*: Offset
  buttons*: uint32
  timestamp*: float
A single pointer event. position is in window coordinates. delta is the per-event movement (for moves). scrollDelta carries wheel deltas (peScroll only). buttons is a platform- specific bitmask. pointer is an opaque ID identifying which finger / cursor. 
PointerEventKind = enum
  peDown, peMove, peUp, peCancel, peHoverEnter, peHoverExit, peScroll
Kinds of pointer events dispatched by the platform runner: down/move/up are taps and drags; cancel aborts an in-progress gesture; hover-enter/exit are mouse hover transitions; scroll carries a wheel delta. 
PostFrameCallback = proc ()
Called once after the next frame completes painting. Used for work that needs to run when layout/paint are stable.

Vars

globalBinding: Binding
Active binding for the app. Set by newBinding. Read by setState machinery, ticker scheduling, and the platform runner.

Procs

proc addPostFrameCallback(b: Binding; cb: PostFrameCallback) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Schedules cb to run after the next frame finishes painting. 
proc clearDirty(b: Binding) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Empties the dirty queue. Called by the runner after a rebuild pass completes. 
proc currentTime(b: Binding): float {....raises: [], tags: [TimeEffect],
                                      forbids: [].}
Seconds since this binding was created. Use as a monotonic clock for animation timestamps. 
proc dispatchKey(b: Binding; ev: KeyEvent) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Enqueues a key event. (No key-event dispatcher is wired up yet; reads from pendingKeys are the caller's responsibility.) 
proc dispatchPointer(b: Binding; ev: PointerEvent) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Enqueues a pointer event. The runner drains the queue every frame via processPointerEvents. 
proc markRootDirty(b: Binding; root: Element) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Adds root to the dirty queue, deduped. Safe to call with nil. 
proc newBinding(canvas: Canvas; surfaceSize: Size;
                devicePixelRatio: float32 = 1.0): Binding {....raises: [],
    tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}

Constructs a binding and installs it as globalBinding.

Inputs:

  • canvas: the drawing surface for this app.
  • surfaceSize: initial window size in logical pixels.
  • devicePixelRatio: backing-store scale factor (2.0 on retina, 1.0 elsewhere).

Effect: also installs an onSetStateRoot hook that pushes dirty elements onto globalBinding.dirtyRoots.

proc scheduleFrame(b: Binding; cb: FrameCallback) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Schedules cb to run on the next frame. Used by Ticker to drive animations.

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-06-09 05:33:48 UTC
